_comment: Data-driven catalog of API-key AI providers for bento-auth. OAuth device-flow providers (claude, openai-codex) keep their bespoke flows in scripts/bento-auth; everything here is a plain API key that bento-auth stores in state.providers and propagates to every BENTO_MANAGED stack. ADDING A PROVIDER = ONE OBJECT BELOW — no code change. EVERY catalog provider gets its OWN dedicated env var(s) so they ALL coexist — registering one never evicts another. Fields: id (subcommand), label, format ('native' = the apps recognise a dedicated key env var built-in, no base URL needed; 'compat' = OpenAI-compatible but NOT built-in, so it gets a dedicated key env PLUS a dedicated base-url env — wire it as a custom provider in your app pointing apiKey/baseUrl at those env vars), env (key var), base_url / base_url_env (compat only — both dedicated, never the shared OPENAI_* slot), signup_url, validate_url (GET with Bearer to verify; empty = skip), note. The shared OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_BASE_URL slot is reserved for the ad-hoc 'bento-auth openai-compat <label> <base_url>' command (exotic/one-off endpoints) and for the real OpenAI / openai-codex — it is NEVER used by a catalog entry.

providers.label: OpenRouter
providers.note: Universal aggregator — one key, hundreds of models. Built-in provider.

providers.label: OpenCode (Zen + Go)
providers.note: One key unlocks BOTH the Zen catalog and the Go subscription; pick models with the opencode/ (Zen) or opencode-go/ (Go) prefix.

providers.label: Google Gemini (API key)
providers.note: Direct API key (Google uses ?key=, not Bearer, so validation is skipped). For the subscription/OAuth tier use the opencode broker (planned).

providers.label: DeepSeek
providers.note: Cheap, strong at coding. Built-in provider.

providers.label: z.ai GLM Coding Plan
providers.note: Cheap GLM coding subscription (~USD 10/mo). Lives in its OWN slot (ZAI_API_KEY + ZAI_BASE_URL) — wire it as a custom OpenAI-compatible provider in your app. Does NOT touch the shared OpenAI slot.

providers.label: Kimi (Moonshot)
providers.note: Own slot (KIMI_API_KEY + KIMI_BASE_URL) — wire as a custom provider.
